ast.name: content
ast.source: The Apps To make Tag and Tally easier there are several tools that can help you.
ast.target: 应用程序 为了让标签与计数更轻松，有几款工具可以为您提供帮助。

ast.name: content
ast.source: If you use Obsidian.md, you can download a vault, with the markdown files for the game installed, a plugin with the forge tool built in, the rules are also in a pretty format, and several commands that can be helpful. You can download the vault from Google Drive.
ast.target: 如果您使用 Obsidian.md，可以下载一个保险库，其中已安装游戏的 Markdown 文件、一个内置锻造工具的插件、格式精美的规则文档，以及一些有用的命令。您可以从 Google Drive 下载该保险库。

ast.name: content
ast.source: If you don't want to use Obsidian.md, there is a web app that you can install to your desktop or your mobile device and it will work on and offline. You can visit the forge at https://forge.tagandtally.quest
ast.target: 如果您不想使用 Obsidian.md，有一个网页应用可以安装到您的桌面或移动设备上，它支持在线和离线使用。您可以在 https://forge.tagandtally.quest 访问锻造工具。

ast.name: content
ast.source: The docs are also available online and offline on the web at https://tageandtally.quest.
ast.target: 文档也可以在网页 https://tageandtally.quest 上在线和离线查阅。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Split the tarot Deck into Major arcana, all numbered suits, and all court suits to make 3 decks. The Major Arcana will help you pick a descriptor, the suit court cards will determine the type and the numbered suit cards will determine the does something special. Descriptor
ast.target: 将塔罗牌组分为大阿尔卡那、所有数字花色牌和所有宫廷牌，组成三副牌。大阿尔卡那牌将帮助您选择一个描述词，宫廷牌将决定类型，数字花色牌将决定特殊效果。描述词

ast.name: content
ast.source: Advantage: when rolling with advantage, you roll two dice and take the highest result.
ast.target: 优势：在具有优势的情况下掷骰时，您掷两次骰子并取最高结果。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Ease: to lower the level of a task/check resulting in a lower DC.
ast.target: 降低难度：降低任务/检定的等级，从而降低难度等级。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Flaw: an attribute that describes an aspect of the character that could be considered bad. A flaw is a tag that can be uses to ease or hinder any appropriate roll.
ast.target: 缺陷：描述角色某个可能被视为负面方面的属性。缺陷是一个标签，可用于降低或阻碍任何适当的掷骰。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Hinder: to raise the level of a task/check resulting in a lower DC.
ast.target: 阻碍：提高任务/检定的等级，从而降低难度等级。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Species: a word or phrase that defines a characters birth attributes such as elf, dwarf or even more specific as a shadow elf. Species can be used as a tag to ease and hinder any appropriate roll.
ast.target: 种族：定义角色先天属性的词或短语，例如精灵、矮人，或更具体的暗影精灵。种族可以用作标签来降低或阻碍任何适当的掷骰。

ast.name: content
ast.source: A Character in Tag & Tally is a collection of tags that can ease or hinder game play.
ast.target: 在《标签与计数》中，角色是一组可以降低或阻碍游戏进程的标签。

ast.name: content
ast.source: If you want a much older character we have rules for that. While you know more, and learn more, you also have a lot more flaws as you advance with age. So keep that in mind when using these rules.
ast.target: 如果您想要一个年长得多的角色，我们有相应的规则。虽然您知道得更多，学得更多，但随着年龄增长，您也会有更多缺陷。因此，在使用这些规则时请记住这一点。

ast.name: content
ast.source: When detailing a character's appearance, you may roll or choose from the Character tables: pronoun, age, distinguishing feature type, skin tone, complexion, build/height, hair (texture, style, color), eye color, clothing, and voice.
ast.target: 在详细描述角色外貌时，您可以掷骰或从角色表格中选择：代词、年龄、显著特征类型、肤色、面色、体型/身高、头发（质地、样式、颜色）、眼睛颜色、服装和声音。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Background Tag: Defining moment of childhood. Flaw Tag: Personality flaw shaped by early life. Additional Tags (up to 2): Early abilities, traits, or learned habits.
ast.target: 背景标签：童年的决定性时刻。缺陷标签：由早期生活塑造的性格缺陷。附加标签（最多2个）：早期能力、特质或习得的习惯。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Background Tag: Defining life-changing event or experience. Occupation Tag: Current occupation or primary life role (job, apprenticeship, or student). Flaw Tag: Flaw tied to ambition, independence, or early mistakes. Additional Tags: Skills, habits, or traits developed in young adulthood.
ast.target: 背景标签：改变人生的决定性事件或经历。职业标签：当前职业或主要生活角色（工作、学徒或学生）。缺陷标签：与野心、独立性或早期错误相关的缺陷。附加标签：青年时期发展的技能、习惯或特质。

ast.name: content
ast.source: A Creature in Tag & Tally is a collection of tags that can ease or hinder game play.
ast.target: 在《标签与计数》中，生物是一组可以降低或阻碍游戏进程的标签。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Quest: Discover who is smuggling relics through the river docks
ast.target: 任务：查明谁在通过河运码头走私文物。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Future dock scenes may justify higher opposition or predefined threat levels Ilya’s personal quest is pressured; reputation risk increases The scene ends because the original intent is meaningfully altered.
ast.target: 未来的码头场景可能需要更高的对抗等级或预设的威胁等级。伊利亚的个人任务受到压力；声誉风险增加。场景结束，因为原始意图被实质性改变。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Name: Ilya Personal Quest: Prove I am more than my family’s reputation Relevant Tags: - Trained Investigator - Known to the Dockworkers - Haunted by a Past Failure
ast.target: 姓名：伊利亚 个人任务：证明我不仅仅是家族声誉的代表 相关标签： - 训练有素的调查员 - 码头工人熟知 - 被过去的失败所困扰

ast.name: content
ast.source: This is not the first scene of play. The previous scene was Level 4. Dice formula: 1d6 + 2 Roll: 3 + 2 = Scene Level 5 The docks are moderately dangerous, tense, and active.
ast.target: 这不是游戏的第一个场景。上一个场景是4级。骰子公式：1d6 + 2 掷骰结果：3 + 2 = 场景等级5 码头中等危险、紧张且活跃。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Rolled result: “Someone is watching, but it’s not clear who.” This informs tone but does not impose mechanics yet.
ast.target: 掷骰结果：“有人在观察，但不清楚是谁。”这影响了基调，但尚未施加机制。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Immediate goal: Identify who is coordinating the smuggling operation tonight. Quest advanced or threatened: - Advances the smuggling investigation quest - Risks complicating Ilya’s personal quest if he fails publicly
ast.target: 即时目标：确定今晚谁在协调走私行动。任务推进或受到威胁： - 推进走私调查任务 - 如果伊利亚公开失败，可能会使他的个人任务复杂化

ast.name: content
ast.source: If successful: - Gain a solid insight identifying a key smuggler If failed: - The smugglers notice Ilya’s interest and take countermeasures
ast.target: 如果成功： - 获得关键见解，识别出一名关键走私者 如果失败： - 走私者注意到伊利亚的兴趣并采取反制措施

ast.name: content
ast.source: Tag and Tally is meant to be played solo or in a gm-less way. When playing with multiple players it is important to have a structure to how the world reacts to you and the rest of the party. There are several methods to do this.
ast.target: 《标签与计数》旨在单人或无游戏主持人的方式下进行。当与多名玩家一起游戏时，建立一个世界如何对您和队伍其他成员做出反应的结构非常重要。有几种方法可以做到这一点。

ast.name: content
ast.source: An NPC in Tag & Tally is a collection of tags that can ease or hinder game play.
ast.target: 在《标签与计数》中，NPC是一组可以降低或阻碍游戏进程的标签。

ast.name: content
ast.source: When creating a party in Tag and Tally, whether in solo play or with a group there should always be connections.
ast.target: 在《标签与计数》中创建队伍时，无论是单人游戏还是团队游戏，都应该始终存在联系。

ast.name: content
ast.source: To start playing we need to answer a few questions. Where? Who? What and Why? We've shown you the answer to the question "How?" in the previous section.
ast.target: 要开始游戏，我们需要回答几个问题。在哪里？谁？什么和为什么？我们已经在上一节中向您展示了“如何？”的答案。

ast.name: content
ast.source: What is the purpose of the game Now that you have your characters and your setting it's time to think about what the character(s) are going to do. There are several methods you go could about doing this. I like The Oracle Method and the Quest Method.
ast.target: 游戏的目的是什么 现在您有了角色和设定，是时候思考角色将要做什么了。有几种方法可以做到这一点。我喜欢神谕法和任务法。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Species are an umbrella tag with some special characteristics.
ast.target: 种族是一个具有某些特殊特征的总括性标签。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Create a species sentence Determine Languages Determine if species has innate magic and which types and what their Base MAI is. Assign a Weakness Determine 2 abilities/traits \ \ for each additional beyond 2 another weakness/flaw must be added
ast.target: 创建一个种族句子 确定语言 确定种族是否具有天生魔法，以及哪些类型及其基础魔法能力指数。分配一个弱点 确定2个能力/特质 \\ \\ 每增加一个超出2个的能力/特质，必须增加一个弱点/缺陷

ast.name: content
ast.source: !character Species This species is a \aged \descriptor\ people who \cultural trait or motivation\ and \physical/biological feature\.
ast.target: !character 种族 这个种族是一个 \\年龄 \\描述词\\ 的民族，他们 \\文化特质或动机\\ 并且 \\身体/生物特征\\。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Spells are a simplified sentence but their core is built on following the procedure to determine the level of the spell.
ast.target: 法术是一个简化的句子，但其核心是基于遵循确定法术等级的程序。

ast.name: content
ast.source: !magic Spell Name is a \descriptor\ \base\ spell that \does something\.
ast.target: !magic 法术名称 是一个 \\描述\\ \\基础\\ 法术，它 \\执行某种效果\\。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Types are an umbrella tag. They are a specific sentence, and often have a parent type from which they hail. The parent type does not have a parent type — no grandparents here.
ast.target: 类型是一个总括性标签。它们是一个特定的句子，并且通常有一个父类型作为来源。父类型没有父类型——这里没有祖父母。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Tag and Tally © 2025-2026 is licensed under CC BY-SA 4.0. To view a copy of this license, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/ [terms-of-service|Terms of Service] | [privacy-policy|Privacy Policy]
ast.target: Tag and Tally © 2025-2026 采用 CC BY-SA 4.0 许可。要查看此许可证的副本，请访问 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/ [terms-of-service|服务条款] | [privacy-policy|隐私政策]

ast.name: content
ast.source: Crafting, Theiving, Hunting, Trapping, Navigation, and other specialty tasks that have multiple tools can have a kit that contain all the tools necessary and only take up one slot.
ast.target: 制作、盗窃、狩猎、陷阱、导航以及其他需要多种工具的专业任务，可以拥有一个包含所有必要工具的工具包，并且只占用一个槽位。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Quests may have multiple intermediate steps. Each step completed: - Counts toward the Plan tally if preparation was required. - Reduces the Countdown tally by 1 mark. Allows for branching or staged objectives, giving players opportunities to actively mitigate consequences.
ast.target: 任务可能有多个中间步骤。完成的每个步骤：- 如果需要准备，则计入计划计数。- 将倒计时计数减少1个标记。允许分支或分阶段目标，给玩家提供主动减轻后果的机会。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Downtime Points represent the number of activities you can do that constitute resting in safe zone allowing you to heal wounds. You do not have to sleep, but it is recommended each character sleep 4 hours so they wake up Refreshed.
ast.target: 休息点代表你可以在安全区进行的活动数量，这些活动构成休息，允许你治疗伤口。你不必睡觉，但建议每个角色睡4小时，以便醒来时获得“精神焕发”状态。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You may cook a meal, go out to a restaurant. Sending 1 hour at a dinner downtime activity yields the \Well fed tag for the following day. You may only spend 1 hour at Dinner.
ast.target: 你可以烹饪一顿饭，或者去餐厅。在晚餐休息活动中花费1小时，可获得次日的“饱餐”标签。你只能在晚餐上花费1小时。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Meditating for 1 hour provides you with a \Zen tag for the following day. You may only meditate for 1 hour a night.
ast.target: 冥想1小时可为你提供次日的“禅定”标签。你每晚只能冥想1小时。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Sleeping gives you a \Refreshed Tag for the following day. No matter how many hours you sleep the tag does not tier. In addition to the \Refreshed Tag, for every 4 hours of sleep a character may heal one additional type of injury (all strains, 1 lingering trauma, or downgrade 1 debilitating injury).
ast.target: 睡觉会给你次日的“精神焕发”标签。无论你睡多少小时，该标签都不会升级。除了“精神焕发”标签外，每睡4小时，角色可以额外治愈一种类型的伤害（所有应激、1个持续性创伤，或降级1个致残性伤害）。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are more than welcome to write/play out actual dialog and have a conversation with your NPCs. Or if you aren't feeling like a novelist or story teller today you can opt to choose a more mechanical method below. Pick a Pathway.
ast.target: 你完全可以编写/演绎实际对话，并与你的NPC交谈。或者，如果你今天不想当小说家或讲故事的人，你可以选择下面更机械的方法。选择一条路径。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Air, Earth, Water, Fire Life, Death Mind, Time, Space, Sound, Illusion Shadow, Light
ast.target: 气、地、水、火 生、死 心、时、空、声、幻 影、光

ast.name: content
ast.source: Order — structure and stability Chaos — Motion and transformation Void — Nullification and isolation Spirit — Conscious link
ast.target: 秩序 — 结构与稳定 混沌 — 运动与转化 虚空 — 无效化与孤立 灵魂 — 意识链接

ast.name: content
ast.source: Spells are cast in one of four ways using Artifacts. These artifacts define how a spell is executed and influence its ease, risk, and activation.
ast.target: 法术通过使用神器以四种方式之一施放。这些神器定义了法术的执行方式，并影响其简易度、风险和激活。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Spells have a sentence like all other things in Tag & Tally. !magic Spell Name is a \descriptor\ \base\ spell that \does something\.
ast.target: 法术和Tag & Tally中的其他事物一样，有一个句子。!magic 法术名称 是一个 \\描述\\ \\基础\\ 法术，它 \\执行某种效果\\。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Damage — Harmful effects Counter — Nullifies or prevents effects Control — Manipulates forces/objects Summon — Calls forth creatures or objects Ward — Protection-based effects
ast.target: 伤害 — 有害效果 反制 — 无效化或阻止效果 控制 — 操纵力量/物体 召唤 — 召唤生物或物体 结界 — 基于保护的效果

ast.name: content
ast.source: Every player character should have enough income to survive with their base expenses. Your income is your base Wealth value. For the most part the income shouldn't change unless there are in game reasons for it to do so.
ast.target: 每个玩家角色都应有足够的收入来维持基本开销。你的收入就是你的基础财富值。在大多数情况下，收入不应改变，除非有游戏内的理由使其改变。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Euler's number, the base of the natural logarithm. Approximately equal to 2.71828
ast.target: 欧拉数，自然对数的底数。约等于2.71828

ast.name: description
ast.source: Imaginary unit, defined as i*i=-1. A complex number is described as a + b*i, where a is the real part, and b is the imaginary part.
ast.target: 虚数单位，定义为 i*i=-1。复数表示为 a + b*i，其中 a 是实部，b 是虚部。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Infinity, a number which is larger than the maximum number that can be handled by a floating point number.
ast.target: 无穷大，一个大于浮点数所能处理的最大数字的数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the natural logarithm of 10, approximately equal to 2.302
ast.target: 返回10的自然对数，约等于2.302

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the natural logarithm of 2, approximately equal to 0.693
ast.target: 返回2的自然对数，约等于0.693

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the base-10 logarithm of E, approximately equal to 0.434
ast.target: 返回E的以10为底的对数，约等于0.434

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the base-2 logarithm of E, approximately equal to 1.442
ast.target: 返回E的以2为底的对数，约等于1.442

ast.name: description
ast.source: Phi is the golden ratio. Two quantities are in the golden ratio if their ratio is the same as the ratio of their sum to the larger of the two quantities. Phi is defined as `(1 + sqrt(5)) / 2` and is approximately 1.618034...
ast.target: Phi 是黄金比例。当两个量的比值等于它们的和与两者中较大者的比值时，它们就处于黄金比例。Phi 定义为 `(1 + sqrt(5)) / 2`，约等于 1.618034...

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the square root of 1/2, approximately equal to 0.707
ast.target: 返回 1/2 的平方根，约等于 0.707

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the square root of 2, approximately equal to 1.414
ast.target: 返回 2 的平方根，约等于 1.414

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tau is the ratio constant of a circle's circumference to radius, equal to 2 * pi, approximately 6.2832.
ast.target: Tau 是圆的周长与半径的比值常数，等于 2 * pi，约等于 6.2832。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a big number from a number or string.
ast.target: 从数字或字符串创建一个大数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a bigint, an integer with an arbitrary number of digits, from a number or string.
ast.target: 从数字或字符串创建一个大整数，即具有任意位数的整数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert a string or number into a boolean.
ast.target: 将字符串或数字转换为布尔值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a user-defined unit and register it with the Unit type.
ast.target: 创建一个用户定义的单位，并将其注册到 Unit 类型中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a fraction from a number or from integer numerator and denominator.
ast.target: 从数字或整数分子和分母创建一个分数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create an index to get or replace a subset of a matrix
ast.target: 创建一个索引，用于获取或替换矩阵的子集。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a number or convert a string or boolean into a number.
ast.target: 创建一个数字，或将字符串或布尔值转换为数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Split a unit in an array of units whose sum is equal to the original unit.
ast.target: 将一个单位拆分为一个单位数组，其总和等于原始单位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a string or convert a value to a string
ast.target: 创建一个字符串，或将一个值转换为字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Import functions or constants from an object.
ast.target: 从对象导入函数或常量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Takes the derivative of an expression expressed in parser Nodes. The derivative will be taken over the supplied variable in the second parameter. If there are multiple variables in the expression, it will return a partial derivative.
ast.target: 对以解析器节点表示的表达式求导。导数将对第二个参数中提供的变量求导。如果表达式中有多个变量，它将返回偏导数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Computes the number of leaves in the parse tree of the given expression
ast.target: 计算给定表达式解析树中的叶子节点数量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the Matrix LU decomposition with partial pivoting. Matrix A is decomposed in three matrices (L, U, P) where P * A = L * U
ast.target: 计算矩阵的 LU 分解（带部分主元选取）。矩阵 A 被分解为三个矩阵 (L, U, P)，其中 P * A = L * U。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Finds the roots of a univariate polynomial given by its coefficients starting from constant, linear, and so on, increasing in degree.
ast.target: 根据从常数、线性项等开始的系数，找到一元多项式的根。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the Matrix QR decomposition. Matrix `A` is decomposed in two matrices (`Q`, `R`) where `Q` is an orthogonal matrix and `R` is an upper triangular matrix.
ast.target: 计算矩阵的 QR 分解。矩阵 `A` 被分解为两个矩阵 (`Q`, `R`)，其中 `Q` 是正交矩阵，`R` 是上三角矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Transform a rationalizable expression in a rational fraction. If rational fraction is one variable polynomial then converts the numerator and denominator in canonical form, with decreasing exponents, returning the coefficients of numerator.
ast.target: 将可有理化的表达式转换为有理分式。如果该有理分式是单变量多项式，则将分子和分母转换为规范形式（指数递减），并返回分子的系数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Recursively substitute variables in an expression tree.
ast.target: 递归地替换表达式树中的变量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replace constant subexpressions of node with their values.
ast.target: 用节点的常量子表达式的值替换它们。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Perform simple one-pass simplifications on an expression tree.
ast.target: 对表达式树执行简单的单遍简化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the Matrix LU decomposition with full pivoting. Matrix A is decomposed in two matrices (L, U) and two permutation vectors (pinv, q) where P * A * Q = L * U
ast.target: 计算矩阵的 LU 分解（带完全主元选取）。矩阵 A 被分解为两个矩阵 (L, U) 和两个置换向量 (pinv, q)，其中 P * A * Q = L * U。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns true if the difference of the expressions simplifies to 0
ast.target: 如果表达式的差简化为 0，则返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the cubic root value. If x = y * y * y, then y is the cubic root of x. When `x` is a number or complex number, an optional second argument `allRoots` can be provided to return all three cubic roots. If not provided, the principal root is returned
ast.target: 计算立方根值。如果 x = y * y * y，则 y 是 x 的立方根。当 `x` 是数字或复数时，可以提供可选的第二个参数 `allRoots` 来返回所有三个立方根。如果未提供，则返回主根。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Round a value towards plus infinity. If x is complex, both real and imaginary part are rounded towards plus infinity.
ast.target: 将值向正无穷大方向舍入。如果 x 是复数，则实部和虚部都向正无穷大方向舍入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the cube of a value. The cube of x is x * x * x.
ast.target: 计算一个值的立方。x 的立方是 x * x * x。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the exponent of a value.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the value of subtracting 1 from the exponential value.
ast.target: 计算指数值减去 1 的结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Round a value towards zero. If x is complex, both real and imaginary part are rounded towards zero.
ast.target: 将值向零方向舍入。如果 x 是复数，则实部和虚部都向零方向舍入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Round a value towards minus infinity.If x is complex, both real and imaginary part are rounded towards minus infinity.
ast.target: 将值向负无穷大方向舍入。如果 x 是复数，则实部和虚部都向负无穷大方向舍入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the hypotenuse of a list with values.
ast.target: 计算一个值列表的斜边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the (modular) multiplicative inverse of a modulo b. Solution to the equation ax ≣ 1 (mod b)
ast.target: 计算 a 模 b 的（模）乘法逆元。方程 ax ≣ 1 (mod b) 的解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the logarithm of a value. If no base is provided, the natural logarithm of x is calculated. If base if provided, the logarithm is calculated for the specified base. log(x, base) is defined as log(x) / log(base).
ast.target: 计算一个值的对数。如果未提供底数，则计算 x 的自然对数。如果提供了底数，则计算指定底数的对数。log(x, base) 定义为 log(x) / log(base)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the 10-base logarithm of a value.
ast.target: 计算一个值的以 10 为底的对数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the 2-base of a value. This is the same as calculating `log(x, 2)`.
ast.target: 计算一个值的以 2 为底的对数。这与计算 `log(x, 2)` 相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the norm of a number, vector or matrix.
ast.target: 计算数字、向量或矩阵的范数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the nth root of a value. The principal nth root of a positive real number A, is the positive real solution of the equation "x^root = A".
ast.target: 计算一个值的 n 次方根。正实数 A 的主 n 次方根是方程 \"x^root = A\" 的正实数解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the nth roots of a value. An nth root of a positive real number A, is a positive real solution of the equation "x^root = A". This function returns an array of complex values.
ast.target: 计算一个值的所有 n 次方根。正实数 A 的一个 n 次方根是方程 \"x^root = A\" 的一个正实数解。此函数返回一个复数值数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the power of x to y, x^y.
ast.target: 计算 x 的 y 次幂，即 x^y。

ast.name: description
ast.source: round a value towards the nearest integer.If x is complex, both real and imaginary part are rounded towards the nearest integer. When n is specified, the value is rounded to n decimals.
ast.target: 将值向最近的整数舍入。如果 x 是复数，则实部和虚部都向最近的整数舍入。当指定 n 时，值将被舍入到 n 位小数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the sign of a value. The sign of a value x is 1 when x>0, -1 when x<0, and 0 when x=0.
ast.target: 计算一个值的符号。值 x 的符号在 x>0 时为 1，在 x<0 时为 -1，在 x=0 时为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the square root value. If x = y * y, then y is the square root of x.
ast.target: 计算平方根值。如果 x = y * y，则 y 是 x 的平方根。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the principal square root of a square matrix. The principal square root matrix `X` of another matrix `A` is such that `X * X = A`.
ast.target: 计算方阵的主平方根。矩阵 `A` 的主平方根矩阵 `X` 满足 `X * X = A`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Solves the real-valued Sylvester equation AX+XB=C for X
ast.target: 求解实值 Sylvester 方程 AX+XB=C 中的 X。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Performs a real Schur decomposition of the real matrix A = UTU'
ast.target: 对实矩阵 A = UTU' 执行实 Schur 分解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Solves the Continuous-time Lyapunov equation AP+PA'+Q=0 for P
ast.target: 求解连续时间 Lyapunov 方程 AP+PA'+Q=0 中的 P。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the square of a value. The square of x is x * x.
ast.target: 计算一个值的平方。x 的平方是 x * x。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inverse the sign of a value. Converts booleans and strings to numbers.
ast.target: 反转一个值的符号。将布尔值和字符串转换为数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Converts booleans and strings to numbers.
ast.target: 将布尔值和字符串转换为数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the extended greatest common divisor for two values. The result is an array [d, x, y] with 3 entries, where d is the greatest common divisor, and d = x * a + y * b.
ast.target: 计算两个值的扩展最大公约数。结果是一个包含 3 个元素的数组 [d, x, y]，其中 d 是最大公约数，且 d = x * a + y * b。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise NOT operation. Performs a logical negation on each bit of the given value. Bits that are 0 become 1, and those that are 1 become 0.
ast.target: 按位 NOT 操作。对给定值的每一位执行逻辑取反。0 变为 1，1 变为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise OR operation. Performs the logical inclusive OR operation on each pair of corresponding bits of the two given values. The result in each position is 1 if the first bit is 1 or the second bit is 1 or both bits are 1, otherwise, the result is 0.
ast.target: 按位 OR 操作。对两个给定值的每一对对应位执行逻辑或操作。如果第一位是 1 或第二位是 1 或两者都是 1，则该位置的结果为 1，否则为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise XOR operation, exclusive OR. Performs the logical exclusive OR operation on each pair of corresponding bits of the two given values. The result in each position is 1 if only the first bit is 1 or only the second bit is 1, but will be 0 if both are 0 or both are 1.
ast.target: 按位 XOR 操作，即异或。对两个给定值的每一对对应位执行逻辑异或操作。如果只有第一位是 1 或只有第二位是 1，则该位置的结果为 1，但如果两者都是 0 或两者都是 1，则结果为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise left logical shift of a value x by y number of bits.
ast.target: 将值 x 按位左移 y 位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise right arithmetic shift of a value x by y number of bits.
ast.target: 将值 x 按位算术右移 y 位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise right logical shift of a value x by y number of bits.
ast.target: 将值 x 按位逻辑右移 y 位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Bell Numbers count the number of partitions of a set. A partition is a pairwise disjoint subset of S whose union is S. `bellNumbers` only takes integer arguments. The following condition must be enforced: n >= 0.
ast.target: 贝尔数计算集合的划分数量。划分是 S 的成对不相交子集，其并集为 S。`bellNumbers` 仅接受整数参数。必须满足以下条件：n >= 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Catalan Numbers enumerate combinatorial structures of many different types. catalan only takes integer arguments. The following condition must be enforced: n >= 0.
ast.target: 卡特兰数枚举了许多不同类型的组合结构。catalan 仅接受整数参数。必须满足以下条件：n >= 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The composition counts of n into k parts. composition only takes integer arguments. The following condition must be enforced: k <= n.
ast.target: 组合数计算 n 分成 k 部分的组合数。composition 仅接受整数参数。必须满足以下条件：k <= n。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the argument of a complex value. If x = a+bi, the argument is computed as atan2(b, a).
ast.target: 计算复数值的辐角。如果 x = a+bi，则辐角计算为 atan2(b, a)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the complex conjugate of a complex value. If x = a+bi, the complex conjugate is a-bi.
ast.target: 计算复数值的复共轭。如果 x = a+bi，则复共轭为 a-bi。

ast.name: description

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the full text of a note or file in the vault by vault-relative path. Use when you need exact file contents.
ast.target: 通过相对于保险库的路径读取保险库中笔记或文件的完整文本。当需要精确文件内容时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create or overwrite a file in the vault. Only use paths the user is allowed to access.
ast.target: 在保险库中创建或覆盖文件。仅使用用户有权访问的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: create fails if file exists; overwrite replaces existing
ast.target: 如果文件存在则创建失败；覆盖会替换现有文件

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional folder path to restrict the search to (vault-relative, e.g. 'secrets' or 'field notes'). Matches files at or under that folder.
ast.target: 可选的文件夹路径，用于限制搜索范围（相对于保险库，例如 'secrets' 或 'field notes'）。匹配该文件夹下或其中的文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: What to match against. 'both' (default) checks file path/name AND contents. 'name' checks only path/filename. 'content' checks only file text.
ast.target: 匹配对象。'both'（默认）检查文件路径/名称和内容。'name' 仅检查路径/文件名。'content' 仅检查文件文本。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 可选的文件后缀过滤器，例如 .md（可选）

ast.name: description
ast.source: When false (the default), files under the conversation folder are skipped so prior chats do not leak into search results. Set true only when the user explicitly asks to look into past conversations.
ast.target: 当为 false（默认）时，会跳过对话文件夹下的文件，以防止之前的聊天内容泄露到搜索结果中。仅当用户明确要求查看过去的对话时才设置为 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Folder path to list (vault-relative, e.g. 'secrets' or 'field notes'). Use '' or '/' for the vault root.
ast.target: 要列出的文件夹路径（相对于保险库，例如 'secrets' 或 'field notes'）。使用 '' 或 '/' 表示保险库根目录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Include markdown files in subfolders. Defaults to true.
ast.target: 包含子文件夹中的 markdown 文件。默认为 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional case-insensitive substring filter on filename/path (e.g. 'mimic').
ast.target: 可选的不区分大小写的文件名/路径子字符串过滤器（例如 'mimic'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When false (the default), files under the conversation folder are skipped.
ast.target: 当为 false（默认）时，会跳过对话文件夹下的文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll dice using standard dice notation (e.g. 2d6+1, 1d20, 4d6kh3 for keep-highest-3, 2d20kh1 for advantage, 2d20kl1 for disadvantage). Returns the total and a human-readable breakdown.
ast.target: 使用标准骰子记法掷骰子（例如 2d6+1、1d20、4d6kh3 表示保留最高3个、2d20kh1 表示优势、2d20kl1 表示劣势）。返回总数和人类可读的分解结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The custom table name (matches the '## table name' heading in the user's custom-tables folder).
ast.target: 自定义表名（与用户 custom-tables 文件夹中的 '## table name' 标题匹配）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional override to force fantasy species source for NPC/Character.
ast.target: 可选的覆盖项，用于强制 NPC/角色的奇幻种族来源。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Type of resolution. 'oracle', 'secrets', and 'insights' use likelihood bands (ignore level). 'yes no' rolls 1d6 (even=Yes, odd=No) and ignores both level and likelihood. All other types use a numeric level 0-10.
ast.target: 决议类型。'oracle'、'secrets' 和 'insights' 使用可能性区间（忽略等级）。'yes no' 掷 1d6（偶数=是，奇数=否），并忽略等级和可能性。所有其他类型使用 0-10 的数字等级。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Likelihood modifier for oracle/secrets/insights. -3 = More Likely, 0 = 50/50, 3 = Less Likely. Ignored for other types.
ast.target: oracle/secrets/insights 的可能性修正值。-3 = 更可能，0 = 50/50，3 = 更不可能。其他类型忽略此参数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which set to list. Defaults to 'all'.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional rulebook source filter, e.g. 'scene', 'fantasy/npc'. Ignored when kind is 'custom'.
ast.target: 可选的规则手册来源过滤器，例如 'scene'、'fantasy/npc'。当 kind 为 'custom' 时忽略。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate a full NPC/character appearance block: pronoun, age, height, build, hair, eyes, skin, clothing, voice, and a distinguishing feature (with sub-detail when relevant). Uses the bundled character-* tables. Takes no arguments. Returns a multi-line string with one trait per line.
ast.target: 生成完整的 NPC/角色外观描述块：代词、年龄、身高、体型、头发、眼睛、皮肤、服装、声音和一个显著特征（相关时包含子细节）。使用内置的 character-* 表。不接受参数。返回一个每行一个特征的多行字符串。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 在 +/- 前缺少决议类型

ast.name: error
ast.source: Trailing +/- is only valid for oracle, insights, and secrets
ast.target: 尾部的 +/- 仅对 oracle、insights 和 secrets 有效

ast.name: error
ast.target: 在等级前缺少决议类型
